deviations.what: the controller's onPopinLayoutChanged (ComboBox change handler running a PopinLayout switch with a Block default) is expressed as bound properties instead of a round-trip (AGENTS 'prefer a bindable property', as app 009): the ComboBox's change attribute is dropped, its selectedKey is bound two-way, and the Table gains a popinLayout expression binding that reproduces the switch including its Block default.

the original binds the InfoLabel colorScheme via a frontend formatter (Formatter.availableState: an already-classified Status string mapped to a colorScheme index 8/3/5/9). abap2UI5 being a thin frontend, that mapping is computed in ABAP model_init into a COLOR_SCHEME field and bound colorScheme="{COLOR_SCHEME}" (with path 'Status'), not via a frontend formatter. Visually 1:1 with the original.

the sample's local mock model/data.json (/ProductCollection, 9 rows) is moved verbatim into ABAP model_init on the one default model; all 9 rows and all bound columns kept. Width/Depth/Height are TYPE string (display-only values in a text template with variable decimals like 3.1/1.8 - packed with fixed DECIMALS would add trailing zeros). Pure prefix-drop, renders identically.
